name: StreamBox
description: Telegram File Stream & Direct Link Generator. Upload up to 2GB files securely.

TELEGRAM_API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID from my.telegram.org

TELEGRAM_API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API Hash from my.telegram.org

BIN_CHANNEL_ID.description: The ID of the Telegram channel where files will be stored (e.g., -1001234567890). The bot must be an admin in this channel.
